title: Mozambique
contentHtml:
Export of Coaches for Mozambique Ports and Railways (CFM)

About CFM

Mozambique Ports and Railways (CFM; Portos e Caminhos de Ferro de Moçambique (Portuguese)) is a legally constituted State-owned Company with the responsibility to operate in the area of the transport industry, the Ports and Railways Sector, and to ensure the satisfaction of the needs of the populations in terms of mobility and movement, thus contributing towards the stabilisation and the improvement of the Country's balance of payments in addition to functioning as a promoter of employment [1].

Actual Photograph of Coach in Service with CFM

Summary of Project

CFM has received a loan of USD 95 million from Export-Import Bank of India (Exim Bank) under GOI supported line of Credit for procurement of railway rolling stock including locomotive, passenger coaches and wagons in Mozambique and the part of loan will be applied to eligible payment under contract of Supply of ninety (90) passenger coaches and maintenance of the same for a period of 5 years. Exim bank have published EOI for the same and various interested rolling stock manufacturers/exporters participated in EOI such as BHEL, RITES etc. Exim bank based on their pre qualification criteria declared RITES pre qualified for Passenger coaches including DEMU and 06 Locomotives. Further Exim Bank invites bids from prequalified bidders on behalf of CFM and RITES in consultation with MCF, Raebareli (for Passenger Coaches and DEMU) and BLW, Varanasi(for Locomotives) has submitted the bid and finally on 22.05.2020 CFM issued LOA to RITES and contract was signed on 11.06.2020. The government of India (GoI) extended the line of credit (LoC) to the Government of Mozambique. The credit is planned to be utilized for the procurement of six 3000 HP diesel-electric locomotives and 90 (60 loco-hauled coaches and 30 DEMU coaches) coaches with maintenance support for five years.[2] RITES (a PSU of the Ministry of Railways) has been given the responsibility for the supply. For locomotives and coaches RITES has roped in Banaras Locomotive Works (Varanasi, UP) and Modern Coach Factory (Raebareli, UP), respectively.
contentHtmlHi:
मोज़ाम्बिक पोर्ट्स एंड रेलवेज (CFM) के लिए कोचों का निर्यात

CFM के बारे में

मोज़ाम्बिक पोर्ट्स एंड रेलवेज (CFM; Portos e Caminhos de Ferro de Moçambique (Portuguese)) एक कानूनी रूप से गठित राज्य स्वामित्व वाली कंपनी है जिसकी जिम्मेदारी परिवहन उद्योग, बंदरगाहों और रेलवे क्षेत्र में संचालन करना, जनसंख्या की गतिशीलता और आवागमन की आवश्यकताओं को पूरा करना है, जिससे देश के भुगतान संतुलन को स्थिर करने और बेहतर बनाने में योगदान देना तथा रोजगार संवर्धक के रूप में कार्य करना [1]।

CFM के साथ सेवा में कोच का वास्तविक फोटो

परियोजना का सारांश

CFM ने GOI समर्थित लाइन ऑफ क्रेडिट के तहत भारत के एक्सपोर्ट-इम्पोर्ट बैंक (एक्जिम बैंक) से USD 95 मिलियन का ऋण प्राप्त किया है जो मोज़ाम्बिक में रेलवे रोलिंग स्टॉक (लोकोमोटिव, यात्री कोच और वैगन सहित) की खरीद के लिए है। ऋण का एक हिस्सा नब्बे (90) यात्री कोचों की आपूर्ति और 5 वर्षों के रखरखाव के अनुबंध के योग्य भुगतान पर लागू होगा। एक्जिम बैंक ने इसके लिए EOI जारी किया और BHEL, RITES आदि ने भाग लिया। एक्जिम बैंक ने RITES को यात्री कोच (DEMU सहित) और 06 लोकोमोटिव के लिए अर्हता प्रदान की। आगे CFM की ओर से पूर्व-अर्हीकृत बोलीदाताओं से बोलियाँ आमंत्रित की गईं और MCF, रायबरेली (यात्री कोच और DEMU के लिए) तथा BLW, वाराणसी (लोकोमोटिव के लिए) के परामर्श से RITES ने बोली जमा की। अंततः 22.05.2020 को CFM ने RITES को LOA जारी किया और अनुबंध 11.06.2020 को हस्ताक्षरित हुआ। भारत सरकार ने मोज़ाम्बिक सरकार को लाइन ऑफ क्रेडिट (LoC) विस्तारित किया। क्रेडिट का उपयोग छह 3000 HP डीजल-इलेक्ट्रिक लोकोमोटिव और 90 कोचों (60 लोको-हौल्ड कोच और 30 DEMU कोच) की खरीद तथा 5 वर्षों के रखरखाव समर्थन के लिए किया जाएगा।[2] रेल मंत्रालय की PSU RITES को आपूर्ति की जिम्मेदारी सौंपी गई है। लोकोमोटिव और कोच के लिए RITES ने क्रमशः बनारस लोकोमोटिव वर्क्स (वाराणसी, UP) और मॉडर्न कोच फैक्टरी (रायबरेली, UP) को जोड़ा है।

## **Export of Coaches for Mozambique Ports and Railways (CFM)**

### **About CFM**

Mozambique Ports and Railways (CFM; Portos e Caminhos de Ferro de Moçambique (Portuguese)) is a legally constituted State-owned Company with the responsibility to operate in the area of the transport industry, the Ports and Railways Sector, and to ensure the satisfaction of the needs of the populations in terms of mobility and movement, thus contributing towards the stabilisation and the improvement of the Country's balance of payments in addition to functioning as a promoter of employment [1](https://www.cfm.co.mz/en/about-cfm/organizacao-2020-actualizado).

![Actual Photograph of Coach in Service with CFM](/Running CFM coaches.jpg)

*Actual Photograph of Coach in Service with CFM*

### **Summary of Project**

CFM has received a loan of USD 95 million from Export-Import Bank of India (Exim Bank) under GOI supported line of Credit for procurement of railway rolling stock including locomotive, passenger coaches and wagons in Mozambique and the part of loan will be applied to eligible payment under contract of Supply of ninety (90) passenger coaches and maintenance of the same for a period of 5 years. Exim bank have published EOI for the same  and various interested rolling stock manufacturers/exporters participated in EOI such as BHEL, RITES etc. Exim bank based on their pre qualification criteria declared RITES pre qualified for Passenger coaches including DEMU  and   06 Locomotives. Further Exim Bank invites bids from prequalified bidders on behalf of CFM and RITES in consultation with MCF, Raebareli (for Passenger Coaches and DEMU) and BLW, Varanasi(for Locomotives) has submitted the bid and finally on 22.05.2020 CFM issued LOA to RITES and contract was signed on 11.06.2020. The government of India (GoI) extended the line of credit (LoC) to the Government of Mozambique. The credit is planned to be utilized for the procurement of six 3000 HP diesel-electric locomotives and 90 (60 loco-hauled coaches and 30 DEMU coaches) coaches with maintenance support for five years.[2] RITES (a PSU of the Ministry of Railways) has been given the responsibility for the supply. For locomotives and coaches RITES has roped in Banaras Locomotive Works (Varanasi, UP) and Modern Coach Factory (Raebareli, UP), respectively.

## **मोज़ाम्बिक पोर्ट्स एंड रेलवेज (CFM) के लिए कोचों का निर्यात**

### **CFM के बारे में**

मोज़ाम्बिक पोर्ट्स एंड रेलवेज (CFM; Portos e Caminhos de Ferro de Moçambique (Portuguese)) एक कानूनी रूप से गठित राज्य स्वामित्व वाली कंपनी है जिसकी जिम्मेदारी परिवहन उद्योग, बंदरगाहों और रेलवे क्षेत्र में संचालन करना, जनसंख्या की गतिशीलता और आवागमन की आवश्यकताओं को पूरा करना है, जिससे देश के भुगतान संतुलन को स्थिर करने और बेहतर बनाने में योगदान देना तथा रोजगार संवर्धक के रूप में कार्य करना [1](https://www.cfm.co.mz/en/about-cfm/organizacao-2020-actualizado)।

![CFM के साथ सेवा में कोच का वास्तविक फोटो](/Running CFM coaches.jpg)

*CFM के साथ सेवा में कोच का वास्तविक फोटो*

### **परियोजना का सारांश**
